title: Sync comments from JIRA issue to Monday item using integration
excerpt: I am currently using the built-in JIRA integration in Monday to sync issues. The only thing I haven’t been able to sync between the two is comments made on the Jira ticket to appear in the updates in Monday, and vice ver…

posts.author: jpmoller (JP Moller)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am currently using the built-in JIRA integration in Monday to sync issues. The only thing I haven’t been able to sync between the two is comments made on the Jira ticket to appear in the updates in Monday, and vice versa.

When I select the fields inside my automation, there is no “Comment” field available in the JIRA column

image745×505 28.4 KB

Anyone have any ideas how I can make this work with standard integration?

posts.author: jpmoller (JP Moller)
posts.cookedHtml:
Ah, I might have answered my own question.

looks like the fields supported only syncs “updates” initially. But no subsequent updates

posts.author: Stowl (Nicholas Lee)
posts.cookedHtml: So there is no way to send comments from the Jira page to the update field on a Monday item?
